channel.title: Unity3d on Tobias Theel | Senior Software Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in Unity3d on Tobias Theel | Senior Software Engineer

item.title: Creating your own Unity library package
item.description:
Introduction

Developing games in Unity often requires leveraging third-party libraries to handle complex tasks like dependency injection, tweening, or networking. In this post, we’ll explore the must-have libraries for any serious Unity project.

(Content placeholder for Unity libraries)
